url.description: URL where event notifications are delivered.

description.description: Human-readable description of the webhook purpose.

type.description: Type of webhook determining which event categories apply.

events.description: List of event types the webhook is subscribed to.

isActive.description: Whether the webhook is currently active and receiving events.

createdAt.description: UTC date-time when the webhook was created.

modifiedAt.description: UTC date-time when the webhook was last modified.
